name: iris
title: iris
description: A circular reveal that grows from / collapses toward the canvas center, like a camera shutter opening. Requires `width` + `height` (pass from `useVideoConfig()`). Wraps Remotion's `iris()`.
pickWhen: cinematic cut focusing to/from a center point — silent-film homage, dream entry/exit. Use `clock-wipe` for the rotating cousin.
